---
title: "Neural Portfolio Control"
# description: "A description of why noisy gradient descent is a spatial and temporal approximation of Mean Field Langevin Dynamics."
author: "Ian McPherson"
date: "2026-01-07"
categories: [math, optimization]
image: "/files/images/placeholder3.JPG"
css: /custom.css
# draft: true
---
In construction.
